name: Banana Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the egg, milk, and oil until well blended.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Gently fold in the mashed banana.
5. Grease two 12-cup muffin tins with butter or non-stick cooking spray.
6. Fill each cup about 2/3 full with batter.
7. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks for 5 minutes before inverting onto plates to serve.
9. Serve immediately with softened butter.
